## Summary

<!-- 1–2 sentences explaining *why* this change exists. Reference the linked issue. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

<!-- Check one. Matches the Conventional Commits prefix you used. -->

- [ ] `feat`, new feature
- [ ] `fix`, bug fix
- [ ] `refactor`, code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `docs`, documentation only
- [ ] `test`, tests only
- [ ] `chore`, tooling, deps, build, CI

## How to test

<!-- Concrete steps a reviewer can follow to verify this change works. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run ci` passes locally
- [ ] Types pass (`bun run types`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for new logic
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, `docs/`, code comments) if behavior changed
